title: $PROMPT_SCROLL
text: $PROMPT_SCROLL Enable or disable automatic scrolling for the $prompt ProcScript function. $PROMPT_SCROLL { = } 1 | 0 Defaults Assignment file: client assignment files Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: 1 Description If set to TRUE or if not defined, Uniface automatically scrolls to the field that is given focus by the $prompt ProcScript function. Prior to Uniface 9.3, the default behavior was not to scroll automatically. To retain this behavior you must explicitly set $PROMPT_SCROLL to 0 . Related Links $prompt Return or set the position for the cursor in the Form when the current ProcScript module ends. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
